tasks.subject: Task 0: Tooling + auth config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add jose + Vitest, and a tested config module (env validation, client-cred resolution, allow-list parsing).

**Files:** Modify package.json; Create vitest.config.ts, lib/auth/config.ts; Test lib/auth/config.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm vitest run lib/auth/config.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/package.json","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/vitest.config.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/config.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/config.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm vitest run lib/auth/config.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["config.test passes","suffixed creds preferred","parseAdminEmails normalizes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: OAuth/PKCE primitives
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PKCE gen, URL-encoded authorize URL, token exchange (HTTP Basic), token signature verify — pure functions.

**Files:** Create lib/auth/oauth.ts; Test lib/auth/oauth.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm vitest run lib/auth/oauth.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/oauth.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/oauth.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm vitest run lib/auth/oauth.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["pkce challenge correct","authorize url encoded + S256","verifyAndExtract valid/invalid","exchangeCode basic+form"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Session cookie module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sign/verify rcf_session JWT with dedicated SESSION_SECRET; edge-safe (jose only).

**Files:** Create lib/auth/session.ts; Test lib/auth/session.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm vitest run lib/auth/session.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/session.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/session.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm vitest run lib/auth/session.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["round-trip","expired->null","garbage->null","cookie name"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Auth flow orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Framework-free startLogin/completeCallback composing config+oauth+session; allow-list + all branching here, fully unit-tested.

**Files:** Create lib/auth/flow.ts; Test lib/auth/flow.test.ts

**Verify:** pnpm vitest run lib/auth/flow.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/flow.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/lib/auth/flow.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm vitest run lib/auth/flow.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["startLogin shape","callback error branches","denied branch","ok branch"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Route handlers + middleware rewrite + drop old login
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire tested flow into App Router routes + edge middleware; delete paste-token login.

**Files:** Create app/auth/{login,callback,logout}/route.ts, app/auth/denied/page.tsx; Modify middleware.ts; Delete app/login/page.tsx

**Verify:** pnpm build && pnpm lint; git grep -n ADMIN_TOKEN ... empty

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/app/auth/login/route.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/app/auth/callback/route.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/app/auth/logout/route.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/app/auth/denied/page.tsx","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/middleware.ts","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/app/login/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm build && pnpm lint","acceptanceCriteria":["build+lint","matcher excludes auth","old login deleted","no ADMIN_TOKEN"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: UI — signed-in email + sign out
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Show logged-in email + Sign out link in header.

**Files:** Modify components/cache-header.tsx (userEmail prop), app/page.tsx (read session)

**Verify:** pnpm build && pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/components/cache-header.tsx","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/app/page.tsx"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm build && pnpm lint","acceptanceCriteria":["userEmail prop + signout","page passes email","build+lint"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Compose/network wiring + env docs + client registration + E2E
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make service reachable to account-service (services-net) + documented; registration runbook + manual E2E.

**Files:** Modify docker-compose.yml (redis-client-frontend block); Create .env.example; Modify CLAUDE.md

**Verify:** docker compose config redis-client-frontend shows services-net + env; manual E2E

```json:metadata
{"files":["docker-compose.yml","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/.env.example","apps-microservices/redis-client-frontend/CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"docker compose config redis-client-frontend","acceptanceCriteria":["services-net + env","env.example complete","CLAUDE.md updated","E2E passes"]}
```
